system.notes: Heat-blocking baffles that mask a vehicle's thermographic signature (gasoline/methane/diesel/jet engines). Parts cost per +1 Signature: ground Body × 5,000¥, motorcycles Body × 6,000¥, trucks/fixed-wing Body × 7,500¥, tractors/helicopters Body × 10,000¥, hovercraft Body × 3,750¥, watercraft/zeppelins Body × 2,500¥; max +2; load −(Body × 50) kg/level; Avail 6/14 days; Street Index 3. Rigger 2 p.130.
